stream.description: This HTTP streaming field MUST NOT be sent in WebSocket `response.create` messages.

stream_options.description: This HTTP streaming options field MUST NOT be sent in WebSocket `response.create` messages.

background.description: This HTTP background-mode field MUST NOT be sent in WebSocket `response.create` messages.

title: WebSocket response create event
description: A client-sent WebSocket event that starts a Responses turn. It uses the normal response-create body plus a required `type` field.
